content:
Watching the Tesla event and I tweeted about it earlier today:

Cybertruck Delivery Event https://t.co/rWd111HvHc

— Tesla (@Tesla) November 29, 2023

I was earlyish to tesla stock, my main strategy being that people underestimated both the technology and the man behind it

to an extent that’s still the case, though I feel we’re at the tail end of it. my most reliable test for it is that elon isn’t widely underestimated anymore

— ਣ.com (@prbhchntn) November 30, 2023
